hero.label: Cannabis Social Club · Catalonia
hero.headline: Welcome to The Farm
hero.subheadline: An exclusive members-only space where cannabis culture, community, and the finest handmade edibles come together.

about.label: Who we are
about.title: More than a club, a community
about.description: The Farm Social Club was born in Catalonia with a clear vision: to create a quality space for people who value cannabis as part of their culture and lifestyle. Here you'll find a calm, respectful environment full of great people.
about.description2: We're proud to welcome both tourists looking to experience authentic Catalan culture and local university students who want a place they can call their own.

edibles.title: Artisan Edibles
edibles.text: We craft our own edibles entirely in-house. Brownies, cookies, gummies and more — all handmade with premium quality ingredients.

cultivation.title: Local Cultivation
cultivation.text: We work with varieties grown in Catalonia following environmentally respectful practices. Guaranteed quality at affordable prices.

community.title: Active Community
community.text: From board games and consoles to edible tastings, poker tournaments and the iconic Member Sunday. There's always something happening at The Farm.

events.label: What makes us special
events.title: Events & Member Benefits
events.description: At The Farm, the experience goes far beyond the product. We run our own events and offer exclusive benefits for our members.

edibleTasting.title: Edible Tasting
edibleTasting.text: Discover and rate our latest handmade creations. A unique sensory experience where members try and give feedback on our newest recipes.

poker.title: Poker Nights
poker.text: Relaxed poker tournaments with great company. A perfect evening to unwind and have a good time with fellow members.

playstation.title: PlayStation Tournaments
playstation.text: Gaming competitions open to all members. Come show your skills in FIFA, NBA 2K and many more titles.

memberSunday.title: Member Sunday
memberSunday.text: Every Sunday belongs to our members. Extra discounts on all selected products and the best atmosphere of the week.

getInvite.label: Join the club
getInvite.title: Access is by invitation only
getInvite.description: The Farm is a private club. To visit us, you'll need an invitation. The process is simple and our team will guide you every step of the way.
getInvite.note: Usual response time is 24 to 48 business hours.

clubRules.label: How we behave
clubRules.title: Internal Rules
clubRules.intro: The Farm Social Club is a private members club created to share a peaceful and welcoming space. This project exists thanks to the commitment of all its members. Taking care of it is a shared responsibility.
clubRules.closing: The Farm belongs to all of us. Let's take care of our community and help it grow. If you have ideas or suggestions, we'll be happy to consider them.

access.title: Access
access.r1: Access is strictly limited to registered members aged 18 and over.
access.r2: Entry is not permitted to non-members.

consumption.title: Consumption & operations
consumption.r1: Consumption is exclusively limited to the club's private space.
consumption.r2: Smoking or consuming on the street or around the premises is strictly prohibited.
consumption.r3: Bringing outside products is not permitted, as the club is sustained by its members' contributions.
consumption.r4: Selling or exchanging products between members is not allowed.

coexistence.title: Coexistence & community
coexistence.r1: This is a space of peace, respect and tranquility.
coexistence.r2: Poor attitudes or disrespect towards members, staff or the premises will not be tolerated.
coexistence.r3: Keeping the space clean and taking care of the facilities is everyone's responsibility.
coexistence.r4: Adequate personal hygiene is required out of respect for the rest of the community.
coexistence.r5: Each member represents the club; individual behaviour affects the whole community.

activities.title: Club activities
activities.r1: We organise activities for members: tastings, social events and cultural initiatives.
activities.r2: The goal is to strengthen community, knowledge and coexistence.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.r1: Each member is responsible for their behaviour inside and outside the club.
responsibility.r2: Discretion and respect are required to protect the association and its members.

breach.title: Non-compliance
breach.r1: Failure to comply with these rules may result in a warning or expulsion.
breach.r2: The club reserves the right of admission and continued membership.

step1.title: Request Access
step1.text: Fill out the contact form with your basic details. That's all you need to get started.

step2.title: We Review Your Request
step2.text: The Farm team reviews your request and gets back to you within 24 to 48 business hours.

step3.title: Receive Your Invitation
step3.text: If everything checks out, you'll receive your personal invitation. Keep it safe — you'll need it on your first visit.

step4.title: Welcome to The Farm
step4.text: Show up at the club with your invitation and ID. From this point on, you're part of the family.

age.title: Legal Age
age.text: You must be at least 18 years old. ID will be checked at the entrance on every visit.

membership.title: Membership Fee
membership.text: Membership is annual. It includes club access, exclusive events, discounts and all member benefits.

student.title: University Discount
student.text: If you're a university student, you get a discount on all club products. Just verify your student status the first time you request it.

legal.title: Documentation
legal.text: A valid national ID, NIE or passport is required on every visit. No documentation, no access.

faq.label: Got questions?
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions – Cannabis Club Vic Spain

invitation.question: How do I get an invitation to the club?
invitation.answer: You can request an invitation through the form on our website. Our team will review your application and contact you within 24 to 48 working hours.

legal.question: Is a cannabis social club legal in Catalonia?
legal.answer: Cannabis social clubs in Catalonia operate within a specific legal framework as private, non-profit associations. Consumption is restricted to the private club space and is exclusively reserved for registered adult members.

cost.question: How much does membership cost?
cost.answer: Membership is annual. Please contact us through the request form to receive up-to-date information on fees and included benefits.

membership.question: Is membership mandatory?
membership.answer: Yes. The Farm is a private association and only registered members may access the club.

location.question: Where is The Farm Social Club located?
location.answer: We are located on Carrer de Francesc Pla el Vigatà, Vic, Catalonia — approximately 60 km from Barcelona.

guest.question: Can I bring a guest?
guest.answer: No. Access is reserved exclusively for registered members of the club.

documents.question: What documents do I need to enter?
documents.answer: You must present a valid identity document on every visit: a national ID card, NIE or valid passport.

student.question: Is there a student discount?
student.answer: Yes. University students can access special discounts on selected products by presenting a valid student ID.

difference.question: What is the difference between a cannabis social club and a cannabis association?
difference.answer: In Catalonia both terms are commonly used to describe the same model: a private non-profit association where members can collectively consume cannabis within the private club space.

tourist.question: Can I visit as a tourist?
tourist.answer: Visitors and tourists aged 18 and over can apply to become members through the invitation form. The admissions process is the same for all applicants.

finalCta.title: Ready to join The Farm?
finalCta.description: Become part of a unique community in Catalonia. Artisan edibles, quality cultivation, exclusive events and a community that will welcome you with open arms.

cookieBanner.message: We use essential technical cookies necessary for the site to function. You can accept or reject them.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: The Farm Social Club ('the Club') handles personal data in strict compliance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 on Personal Data Protection (LOPDGDD).
privacyPolicy.s1Content:
Name: The Farm Social Club
Address: Carrer Francesc Pla el Vigatà, 14 · Vic, Barcelona
Contact: thefarmvic@gmail.com
privacyPolicy.s2Content: We only collect data you provide voluntarily through the contact or membership request form: name, email address and phone number. We do not collect special-category data.
privacyPolicy.s3Content: Your data is processed to handle your membership application and to keep you informed of club activities. The legal basis for processing is your explicit consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR).
privacyPolicy.s4Content: We keep your data for as long as you remain an active member or until you request deletion. After the relationship ends, data is retained for the period required by applicable law.
privacyPolicy.s5Content: We do not share your data with third parties except where required by law. We do not carry out international data transfers.
privacyPolicy.s6Content: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, portability, restriction and objection at any time by writing to thefarmvic@gmail.com. If you believe your data is being processed in breach of applicable regulations, you may lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es).

cookiesPolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPolicy.intro: This website uses only technical first-party cookies necessary for its proper operation. We do not use advertising or third-party tracking cookies.
cookiesPolicy.s1Content: Cookies are small text files stored in your browser when you visit a website. They allow session information to be remembered and improve your browsing experience.
cookiesPolicy.s2Content: We only use essential technical session cookies required for the site to function correctly. These cookies do not collect personal data and are not used for advertising or behavioural analysis purposes.
cookiesPolicy.s3Content:
You can configure your browser to reject or delete cookies at any time. Please note that disabling them may affect the correct functioning of some parts of the site.

Configuration guides: Chrome · Firefox · Safari · Edge.
cookiesPolicy.s4Content: If you have any questions about our cookie policy, please contact us at thefarmvic@gmail.com.

legalNotice.title: Legal Notice
legalNotice.intro: In compliance with Article 10 of Spanish Law 34/2002 of 11 July on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), the following identifying information is provided:
legalNotice.s1Content:
Name: The Farm Social Club
Legal form: Private non-profit cannabis consumer association
Registered address: Carrer Francesc Pla el Vigatà, 14 · Vic, Barcelona
Contact: thefarmvic@gmail.com
legalNotice.s2Content: This website is strictly informational and is intended solely to provide information about The Farm Social Club. The Club is a private non-profit association whose access is restricted to registered members aged 18 and over. Use of this website implies acceptance of these terms.
legalNotice.s3Content: All content on this website — texts, images, logos and graphic design — is the property of The Farm Social Club or of third parties who have authorised its use. Reproduction, distribution or public communication without written authorisation from the rights holder is expressly prohibited.
legalNotice.s4Content: The Farm Social Club accepts no liability for damages arising from the use of information on this site or from any technical failures beyond its control. We reserve the right to modify or withdraw content without prior notice.
legalNotice.s5Content: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For the resolution of any dispute, both parties expressly submit to the courts of Vic (Barcelona), waiving any other jurisdiction that may apply.
